descriptionHtml:
Bali 4.4 for sale 2025 | 3 Cabins Owner's Version | Tax Not Paid

NEW

Cancelled order at a very  interesting price, the Bali 4.4 for sale 2025 presents a well-balanced solution for those seeking space, comfort, and practical features. This NEW model is offered in a three-cabin layout (one portside, two starboard), each with a private head, making it suitable for families, couples, or mixed crews who prioritise privacy and convenience. Her design provides easy movement between social and private areas, with thoughtful layouts inside and out.

Specifications:
(AUTOPILOT, UNDERWATER LIGHTS, WASHER DRYER, SOLAR PANELS, CODE 0...)

Excellence Pack

  • Freshwater purifying filter
  • Combined 80 amp battery charger/inverter 12V (or 24V)/230V – 2000VA
  • 2 extra service batteries of 12V – 130 amp
  • Battery controller
  • Indirect cabin lighting
  • Forward cockpit and transom courtesy lighting
  • Domestic fridge freezer (615L) with chilled water, ice maker, and dedicated inverter 230V
  • Bar integrated in saloon table, reversible tray
  • Mainsail electrical winch
  • Dinghy lifting system
  • Electric windlass 1500W
  • Saloon manual tilting bay/door mechanically assisted by pneumatic struts
  • Hot and cold cockpit shower
  • Comfortable swim ladder with handles and wide teak steps
  • Extra fuel tank 400L (total capacity 800L)
  • Extra freshwater tank 400L (total capacity 860L)
  • Gas oven
  • Pot holders on hob
  • Engine room and locker hatches on gas struts
  • Helm station seat cushions (seat and backrest)
  • Forward cockpit cushions (seats and backrests)
  • Seats for aft bench (seats and backrests)
  • Two layers of antifouling with epoxy base coat
  • Raymarine Electronic Pack: Autopilot P70S, GPS plotter AXIOM 7", MULTI I70S, VHF RAY 63 + VHF RAY MIC at steering station, AIS receiver/transmitter, full touchscreen AXIOM 12" at steering station
  • Transom stickers for name and port of registry

Elegance Pack

  • Hull: padded headboard, indirect lighting, chrome-plated reading lights, magazine pockets in master suite, comfort accessories in bathrooms
  • Saloon: chart table reading light, folding seat for chart table, ambient lighting, saloon table with bar and solid wood surrounds, upholstery bands with armrests, electric rear bay lift system (hydraulic cylinders), flagpole and bracket

Rigging – Sails

  • Reinforced Dacron fully-battened mainsail and Solent with UV protection, Lazy-Bag, Lazy-Jacks, and sheets
  • Triradial Code 0 (74m²) with anti-twist cable
  • Code 0 rigging: bow sprit, furler, halyard, bobstays, blocks, deck fittings
  • Manual winch for head sails

Mechanics & Safety Equipment

  • 2 x NANNI 57 hp engines (upgrade from 40hp)
  • Pair of 3-blade folding propellers
  • Solar panels: 4 x 100W (400W total)
  • Remote control with chain counter at helm station
  • Safety equipment for 8: liferaft, lifejackets with harnesses, lanyards, green light-sticks, horseshoe buoy, self-righting light, buoy and bracket, hand flares, compass, logbook, flashlight, bucket, first aid kit

Comfort

  • Tilting forward windows with locking system
  • Large freshwater electric toilet
  • Sea water pump at galley and anchor
  • 1 fan per cabin, saloon, and forepeak (max 2 in saloon)
  • 4-burner glass hob and extra-large oven
  • 6kg/5kg washer-dryer machine in bathroom (3-cabin version)

Exterior Setup

  • Rigid helm station bimini
  • Forward cockpit fixed table
  • Flybridge upholstery: cushions (seats and backrests)
  • Flybridge table with telescopic leg
  • Sun awning for forward cockpit
  • Folding sun loungers for foredeck
  • Flybridge sunbathing cushions with backrests
  • Protective rubrail for sugarscoops and aft platform
  • Stern spring cleats
  • LED underwater blue lights (4 spots under each transom)
  • Plancha grill with gas installation
  • Electrical davit

Electronics – Hifi

  • Hifi Radio Fusion 6 HP Bluetooth (saloon, flybridge, and front cockpit)

Choosing a Bali 4.4 for sale 2025 offers a modern multihull ready for comfortable cruising, versatile enough for both coastal and offshore adventures. For further details or viewing arrangements, don't hesitate to contact us!
